Amphimene orbiculata, also known as Round-leaved Amphimene, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae.

The health benefits of Amphimene orbiculata are not well-documented, however, it is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is also used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.

The bioactive constituents of Amphimene orbiculata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made with Amphimene orbiculata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
